name: marketing-brief
description: Brief → review → publish for marketing campaigns. An executor drafts the brief + channel messages, a human reviewer approves (or rejects into a rework loop), then publish + notify run on approval. No PR is opened.

stages.name: draft
review
stages.task: Review the campaign brief for {{.Key}} — brand voice, accuracy, and channel fit. Approve to publish or reject for rework.

stages.name: publish
stages.task: Publish the approved campaign for {{.Key}}: finalise the assets under ./campaigns/{{.Key}}/ and call finish.
